message:
fix(trace): add MAX_EVENT_SIZE bounds check in read_event_compat; audit batch 376-378 (16 files)

read_event_compat() was missing the MAX_EVENT_SIZE guard that both
read_event() and CompatEventIterator::next() had, allowing a corrupted
or malicious trace file to trigger unbounded memory allocation.

Audit batch 376-378: 16 files (~16,813L), 1 MEDIUM bug found and fixed,
15 files SOUND. Files: sync/rwlock, distributed/recovery, quic_native/connection,
combinator/hedge, io/copy, record/distributed_region, trace/compat (FIXED),
trace/delta_debug, trace/distributed/crdt, runtime/reactor/browser,
trace/filter, lab/oracle/determinism, service/filter, channel/clock_skew,
sync/barrier, sync/contended_mutex.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
